name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ turn' = turn + 1
          /\ turn' <= N
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "critical"]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSubsets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in FiniteSubsets(N)
  /\ coordinator \in N
  /\ messages \in FiniteSubsets({[sender \in N, receiver \in N, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]})

Init ==
  /\ participants = {}
  /\ coordinator = 1
  /\ messages = {}

Next ==
  \/ /\ participants' = participants \cup {coordinator}
     /\ messages' = messages
  \/ /\ participants' = participants
     /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender \in N, receiver \in N, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}] }

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Null

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = Null means fork f is free *)
(* State: state[p] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init ==
  /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> Null]
  /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next ==
  \/ (* Philosopher p becomes hungry *)
     /\ \E p \in 1..N : state[p] = "thinking"
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
     /\ forks' = forks
  \/ (* Philosopher p picks up forks if both are free *)
     /\ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[p] = Null
        /\ forks[If p = 1 then N else p-1] = Null
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = p, ![If p = 1 then N else p-1] = p]
  \/ (* Philosopher p puts down forks *)
     /\ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "eating"
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![p] = Null, ![If p = 1 then N else p-1] = Null]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init ==
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

ProducerAction ==
    /\ size < K
    /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
       /\ size' = size + 1
       /\ q' = Append(q, head)

ConsumerAction ==
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
       /\ tail' = tail
       /\ size' = size - 1
       /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

TypeOK ==
    /\ K \in Nat
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Servers, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
  /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

Next ==
  \/ /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]
     /\ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
  \/ /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Candidate"]
     /\ \E s \in Servers :
        /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
  \/ /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Leader"]
     /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
